session.user:
Run the following command and report the output: `uv run ruff check src/erk/core/capabilities/ src/erk/capabilities/ src/erk/cli/commands/init/capability/`
Working directory: /home/runner/work/erk/erk
session.assistant: I'll run the ruff check command for the specified directories.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/core/capabilities/ src/erk/capabilities/ src/erk/cli/commands/init/capability/
Check ruff linting for capability-related directories

session.assistant:
ruff passed: All checks passed!
The specified directories contain no linting violations: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/capabilities/` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/capabilities/` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/init/capability/`
